title: Homepage editorial portrait
alt: Editorial placeholder portrait of a creative product leader in a dark studio.
prompt: Cinematic editorial portrait placeholder of a senior UX/product design leader in a black shirt at a dark workstation, with subtle laptop light, systems sketches, chrome object, black and paper-white neo-brutalist studio, no logos or readable text.

title: Homepage systems artifact
alt: Public-safe UX systems artifact with sketches, flows, and material-list diagrams.
prompt: Public-safe UX systems artifact showing guided inputs, question-flow cards, mobile wireframes, materials-list logic, and cart handoff diagrams, realistic workshop documentation, no client logo or real UI.

title: Selected work proof collage
alt: Neo-brutalist portfolio sprite sheet with portraits, artifacts, chrome objects, covers, and section headers.
prompt: Use the existing Gibson Hall mood-board sprite as the high-level visual language reference.

title: Home Depot case cover artifact
alt: Public-safe project-shopping UX systems artifact for a large home improvement retailer.
prompt: Create a public-safe process-board visual about guided project inputs, materials lists, measurement questions, and omnichannel handoff; do not show or imitate Home Depot UI.

title: Home Depot project calculator public screenshot
alt: Needed: public-safe Home Depot project calculator screenshot.
prompt: Use a real public HomeDepot.com project calculator screenshot only. Do not restyle or recreate the client UI.

title: Home Depot materials handoff artifact
alt: Public-safe materials-list and cart-handoff artifact for project shopping.
prompt: Create a public-safe artifact showing how measurements and selections become a materials list and pickup/delivery handoff, no real client UI.

title: Home Depot workshop artifact
alt: Public-safe workshop board with guided retail project-shopping patterns.
prompt: Create a workshop artifact with wireframe thumbnails, sticky notes, question taxonomy, and mobile considerations for a large retail catalog; no logos or real UI.

title: CarMax case cover artifact
alt: Public-safe product funnel artifact for an online sell-your-car journey.
prompt: Create a public-safe product design artifact for an online sell-your-car journey with landing test variants, form-flow cards, offer explanation, and next-step diagrams; do not show or imitate CarMax.com UI.

title: CarMax sell-my-car public screenshot
alt: Needed: public-safe CarMax sell-my-car screenshot.
prompt: Use a real public CarMax.com sell-my-car screenshot only. Do not restyle or recreate the client UI.

title: CarMax form funnel artifact
alt: Public-safe form-funnel artifact with anonymized vehicle-selling steps.
prompt: Create a generic vehicle-selling UX flow artifact with 20+ question journey, condition questions, offer comprehension, and online/in-store next steps; no client logo or real UI.

title: CarMax offer delivery artifact
alt: Public-safe offer comprehension and next-step artifact.
prompt: Create an anonymized product artifact showing offer comprehension cards and next-step decision paths, with no fake customer data, no metrics, and no client UI imitation.

title: Mini Murals homepage public screenshot
alt: Mini Murals public website screenshot showing a painted traffic-control-cabinet mural.
prompt: Use the real public Mini Murals homepage screenshot. Preserve the client website and mural photography as-is.

title: Mini Murals in-the-wild mural photo
alt: Painted Mini Murals traffic-control cabinet shown in public street context.
prompt: Use real Mini Murals public photography or an approved Gibson-uploaded mural photo. Preserve the artwork as-is.

title: Mini Murals interactive map screenshot
alt: Mini Murals Houston city and map page screenshot.
prompt: Use the real public Mini Murals Houston city and map screenshot. Preserve the client website as-is.

title: Mini Murals brand or campaign artifact
alt: Needed: Mini Murals logo, email, campaign, or WordPress page artifact.
prompt: Use a real brand, campaign, WordPress, or marketing artifact from Mini Murals. Preserve original client style.

title: Straterra luxury cover
alt: Luxury navy, white, and muted-gold commercial real estate brand visual for Straterra.
prompt: Premium navy, white, and muted gold luxury commercial real estate brand hero; serif-inspired, high-end, precise, Rolex-adjacent restraint without copying Rolex.

title: Straterra public website concept
alt: Launch-safe Straterra public website and brand-direction concept.
prompt: Create a public-facing high-end B2B website concept for Straterra with navy/white/gold, commercial real estate tone, no real listings or private data.

title: Straterra brand guideline artifact
alt: Navy and gold brand guideline-style artifact for Straterra.
prompt: Create a luxury brand guideline frame for Straterra using navy, white, muted gold, serif rhythm, type scale blocks, logo-space placeholders, and no readable proprietary details.

title: Straterra anonymized platform mockup
alt: Anonymized navy and gold commercial-property listings platform mockup.
prompt: Luxury SaaS dashboard mockup for confidential commercial property listings with fake data blocks only, navy interface, white cards, thin gold dividers, filter rail, map placeholder, and detail panel.

title: Dog Easter egg
alt: Friendly cream dog beside a black design notebook in a dark creative studio.
prompt: Tasteful hidden-site Easter egg of a friendly cream doodle-like dog beside a black design notebook and chrome cursor object in a dark creative studio.

title: Drone archive placeholder
alt: Cinematic aerial city-edge geometry and long shadows from above.
prompt: Cinematic drone-photography placeholder showing abstract urban grid, water, rooftops, roads, and long shadows from above, no recognizable city landmarks or Austin references.

title: AI design tools workspace
alt: Needed: Gibson's real or generated AI design workflow workspace.
prompt: Create a premium dark-studio workspace showing Figma, VS Code, AI chat, MCP notes, and motion/storyboard artifacts without readable proprietary text.

title: Design and thinking bookshelf
alt: Needed: editorial image of Gibson's design and human-thinking bookshelf.
prompt: Create a refined editorial bookshelf still life with design, UX, typography, strategy, and human-thinking books represented by unlabeled spines and notes.

title: Inquiry serious-project visual
alt: Premium launch-planning visual with navy, black, white, and gold materials.
prompt: Create a serious founder-project launch-planning visual with refined materials, precise notes, strategy artifacts, and no readable private text.

title: AI systems resource thumbnail
alt: Needed: AI systems resource thumbnail.
prompt: Create a dark editorial resource thumbnail showing AI agent workflow diagrams, skill cards, and design-system notes, no logos or readable proprietary text.

title: Open Graph social preview
alt: Needed: Gibson Hall Open Graph preview image.
prompt: Create a 1200x630 Gibson Hall social preview using black, paper white, chrome, and cosmic accents with the brand name and no client UI.
